payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a black/dark metal fireplace surround showing the lower-right corner of a rectangular firebox opening with stepped recessed trim and a smooth dark hearth; right edge of the metal surround meets a lighter-colored mantel or wall trim — crop is edge-cut and the unit appears about approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
